```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senator Anna M. Caballero secured $1 Million to support the construction of a new centralized water treatment plant and storage tank for the City of Livingston.",
    "The City of Livingston has limited resources and a limited tax base to generate funds for community projects.",
    "Construction of the proposed project will help bring the city’s water system into compliance with water quality requirements.",
    "City leadership has worked to improve the quality of water provided to its residents through a variety of treatment and capacity-increasing projects.",
    "Providing clean, reliable, and safe drinking water for the Livingston community is one of the top priorities for the City of Livingston."
```
